ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE Appraisal INVENTORY
Off Calendar Apr-01-2009 Reset To May-05-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Lieberman for Lynn Smithson.

Mr. Lieberman stated that he needed more time to file the Inventory and Appraisal. The matter was contunued to May 5, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: T. Jackson.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE Appraisal INVENTORY
Off Calendar Mar-02-2009 Reset To Apr-01-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of Final/Complete Inventory And Appraisal.
Off Calendar Feb-02-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-02-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney for failure to appear and for failure to file the Inventory and Appraisal. The return date is March 2, 2009 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Leong.
